content.speaker: Wesley Donaldson
content.text: Alright, let's review the new pipeline architecture. We've got the webhook flow working end to end now.

content.speaker: jeremy.campeau@llsa.com
content.text: Yeah, I saw the Firebase function went live. How's the latency on the Drive sync?

content.speaker: Wesley Donaldson
content.text: It's pretty fast. Usually under 30 seconds from webhook to local file. The watcher picks it up within another 30 seconds.

content.speaker: lance.fallon@llsa.com
content.text: That's impressive. What about error handling? If the LLM extraction fails, does it retry?

content.speaker: Wesley Donaldson
content.text: Failed files get moved to webhook-failed with an audit log. No automatic retry yet, but we could add that.

content.speaker: jeremy.campeau@llsa.com
content.text: Makes sense. Let's revisit retry logic after we've seen how often failures happen in practice.
